title: TNT Barrel
description: Rextured TNT texture to a barrel
body:
# Basic Texture Pack that adds a TNT Barrel

![Rendered image of the TNT block on blender](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64d0c941bf0a2b36a220912ac6a13693e29359e1_0.webp)

This was made as a reference to the [Gunpowder Kegs](https://survivalcraftgame.fandom.com/wiki/Gunpowder_Kegs) from [Survivalcraft](https://kaalus.wordpress.com/)

[Original Texture](https://minecraft-max.net/craft/minecraft-plus-block-biome-mod/99341-minecraft-plus-block-biome-mod-tnt-barrel/#MOD) from Minecraft Plus Block and Biome V (not on modrinth) and can be found [here](https://minecraft-max.net/craft/minecraft-plus-block-biome-mod/)
